message:
feat(render-canvas): add band rendering + complete mock operations

Canvas2D renderer improvements:

1. Add draw_bands() for layout extension rendering:
   - Lane bands: dashed vertical lifelines for sequence diagrams
   - Section bands: light background fills with bold labels for gantt
   - Column bands: subtle vertical separators for kanban

2. Complete MockCanvas2dContext operation recording:
   - QuadraticCurveTo now recorded (was no-op)
   - ArcTo now recorded (was no-op)
   - StrokeText now recorded (was no-op)
   - SetTransform now recorded (was no-op)
   - ResetTransform now recorded (was no-op)
   - New DrawOperation variants: QuadraticCurveTo, ArcTo, StrokeText,
     SetTransform, ResetTransform

This improves test fidelity — mock tests now capture the full set of
canvas operations for assertion, and sequence/gantt/kanban diagrams
render their structural bands in the canvas backend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
